svg.text: CDC (Cloud Data Connector) — End-to-End Architecture Overview
Parquet → HTTP POST → Cloud REST API
NIOS/BloxOne Source Data (DNS, RPZ, DHCP, WAPI)
On-Prem Pipeline (File-based: SCP → Flume → File outputs)
TD_QUERY_RESP_LOG | TD_THREAT_FEEDS_HITS_LOG | DDI_QUERY_RESP_LOG | DDI_DHCP_LEASE_LOG | AUDIT_LOG | SERVICE_LOG | ATLAS_NOTIFICATIONS | SOC_INSIGHTS | SOC_INSIGHTS_V2
CSV (Splunk/Reporting) | CEF (ArcSight) | LEEF (QRadar) | JSON (HTTP/REST) | ASIM (Microsoft Sentinel) | Parquet (Cloud Analytics) | Splunk CIM
CDC Architecture Diagram — Based on actual codebase analysis of Infoblox-CTO repositories
